The professional All Blacks had played a hastily formed New South Wales team, the great Dally Messenger had joined the New Zealand tour of England, and by 1908 a professional league was formed in Sydney, with several of the teams that play in the NRL today. This selection from the Sydney Morning Herald's coverage of the fierce debate that ensued, shows how concerns for the welfare of the game and players were mingled with class-interest, colonial ideologies and greed for profit. - Summary by Phil Benson

title: Camp and Trail
author: Stewart Edward White
description: Stewart Edward White was a popular and respected novelist who set his stories on the western frontier and in the wilderness. For his novels he interviewed numerous veterans of the gold rush and the fur trade, as well as many western pioneers. His westerns breathed authenticity due to the myriad details of daily frontier life that he spiced them with. In his nonprofessional life White was a dedicated outdoorsman and nature-lover, enjoying long hunting, camping, and fishing expeditions. In this practical guide for hitting the trail, White draws from his personal experience as well as knowledge mined from years of research, enriched with pearls of wisdom gleaned from trail guides during long evenings around campfires. - Summary by Ted Lienhart

title: Toxophilus
author: Roger Ascham, J. A. Giles
description: Toxophilus is a book about target archery using the English Longbow. The book is divided into two parts: The first part is an extended argument that target archery should be encouraged as a healthy activity benefiting both the individual and the defense of the country; the second part is an instruction manual about the use of the English longbow for target archery. In 1545, when the book was written, the English Longbow had been in continuous use in European warfare since the medieval period. Ascham points out that target archery is the perfect preparation for the use of the longbow in warfare, so it is likely that the techniques and equipment he describes are very similar to those used by soldiers right back to the hundred years war. Modern archers may be surprised at Ascham’s knowledge about the effect of equipment on shooting performance. Amongst other subjects, Ascham describes finger spacers, arrow spine, barrelled shafts, control of bow hand placement, nocking point, and a draw length indicator. Ascham dedicated Toxophilus to King Henry VIII (who was a keen archer). The King was so pleased with the book that he granted Ascham a pension of ten pounds per year. Edited by J. A. Giles. (Summary by Clive Catterall)

title: Forty Seasons of First-Class Cricket
author: Richard Gorton Barlow
description: R. G. "Dick" Barlow was one of the most accomplished all-round cricketers of the late 19th Century. For many years he opened the batting with A. N. Hornby for Lancashire and England, often acting as a "stonewaller" who "carried his bat through the innings" while his teammates hit out for runs. He also excelled with the ball and delights in telling his readers how he dismissed his contemporary W. G. Grace more often than most. Barlow's 40 years in club, county, and test cricket are recounted with an attention to detail befitting a first class cricketer and umpire. Listeners who prefer their sports autobiographies to be more anecdotal than statistical might do well to start with the three chapters on Barlow's Australian tours with the England cricket team. Francis Thompson's 'At Lords' - a nostalgic tribute to Barlow and Hornby from a Manchester poet - is added as a coda to the book. (Summary by Phil Benson)

title: Modern Magic: A Practical Treatise on the Art of Conjuring
author: Professor Hoffman
description: This "how-to" book covers everything for the 1800's illusionist, from stage presence & dress, program and stage arrangement, to how to do tricks with cards, coins, watches, rings, handkerchiefs, dominoes and dice, cups and balls, hats, and other apparatus. "I have purposely limited my disclosures to such illusions as have been sufficiently long before the public to be fairly regarded as common property. Within this limit I have endeavored to make my explanations as complete as possible; but to go beyond it would be to infringe a moral copyright, and to deprive gentlemen to whom Modern Magic is especially indebted, of the well-earned fruits of their labor and invention." - Summary by TriciaGProof-Listeners: Joyful in MN, Billl Boerst

title: Woodcraft
author: Nessmuk
description: George Washington Sears, who many know better by his pen name "Nessmuk", was an outdoor writer during the last half of the 19th century, writing most often for the magazine "Field and Forest", the predecessor of today's "Field and Stream". "Woodcraft" is his book for "outers" with his tips on how to "smooth it" rather than rough it in the woods. Although some of his methods, equipment and mores may be out of date or objectionable to modern readers, his stories of true wilderness travel tinged with his subtle humor still have messages for those venturing out of doors. His small stature and compromised health made him a proponent of lightweight backpacking and canoe travel with only essential gear, a lesson still relevant today. There is a reason why "Woodcraft" and the slightly abridged, "Woodcraft and Camping", have been continuously in print since its original publication. - Summary by Fritz

title: Bicycling for Ladies
author: Maria E. Ward
description: Written in 1896, at the height of the bicycle craze, Bicycling for Ladies is addressed to the large numbers of women interested in the new "art of wheeling" and wondering how to begin. The book's author, Maria Ward, knew her subject. She was the co-founder of the Staten Island Bicycling Club, and an advocate for women's athletics in general, at a time when women were first emerging from the era of corsets and petticoats. In this book, she delves into the issues of appropriate dress for cycling, endorsing loose practical clothing, shorter skirts, breathable waists, and even knickerbockers. She clearly explains the mechanics of the bicycle, encouraging women to undertake their own bicycle maintenance, and explaining the use of various tools. She encourages women to venture out and explore the world, extolling the pleasures of cycling holidays on the open road with groups of friends, and the sense of independence and confidence to be found in such adventures. The same year that this book appeared in print, famed woman's suffrage leader Susan B. Anthony said that bicycling "has done more to emancipate women than anything else in the world. It gives women a feeling of freedom and self-reliance.” It is that very attitude of freedom and self-reliance that Maria Ward sets out to convey in this practical beginner's guide to cycling.(Summary by Maria Kasper)

author: You Had Me At I Do
description: Wedding Studio by You Had Me At I Do is a podcast for wedding officiants who want to book more couples, create better ceremonies, and run a more professional business. Each episode shares practical wedding tips, ceremony guidance, client communication advice, and officiant business insights, while also showing how Studio by You Had Me At I Do helps officiants stay organized, save time, and deliver a better experience.

title: Decompress with Jess
author: Jessica Marini
description: Decompress with Jess is a podcast about mental health, self -esteem and everything in between. This podcast will be a space where the listener can totally decompress and relax while discussing mental health topics to make it feel less overwhelming.

title: Life After: From Surviving to Thriving
author: Jill McKnight
description: This is the podcast that teaches you to move from surviving to thriving through helpful tips and tricks that change your life!

title: Weathering The Storm
author: Sara, svswx
description: Weathering the Storm by svswx is committed to sharing research, data analysis, updates and information about severe weather events in the United States.

title: I Have Mono with Nathaniel Kressen
author: Jackanoid Paralope
description: Who becomes an actor?

title: Impact with Ease
author: Blake Schofield
description: No more choosing between your career and your life. Here you'll find honest conversations, science-backed strategies, and inspiring stories to help you thrive at work and truly enjoy your life outside of it.

title: Moms, Miles and Memories
author: Moms, Miles and Memories
description: Real life. Real friendship. Real conversations. Join Jen and Michelle as they share stories, lessons, and adventures from every season of life—channeling fun along the way.

title: Handley and Hansen
author: AM 590 WOW
description: Hosted by Nick Handley and Grant Hansen, Handley and Hansen is on AM 590 WOW from 2-6 p.m. each weekday in Omaha.

title: Argus Research Outlook & Ideas
author: cwygal930
description:
Argus Research's Monthly Webinar Series brings clients expert market analysis, midyear updates, and in-depth sector insights, now on Spotify and Apple Podcasts. Hosted by Director of Research Jim Kelleher, CFA, with revolving Argus analysts each month, episodes cover market outlooks, investment ideas, and the trends shaping key industries.
For full research and Argus subscription info, visit argusresearch.com. To register for future webinars, visit the Argus Research website and click "Register Here" under News & Media.

title: The CLEAR Leadership Podcast
author: Jaime Vallejo
description: Most organizations don't have a talent problem—they have an obstacle problem. The CLEAR Leadership Podcast challenges conventional leadership thinking and equips leaders to remove barriers, unlock potential, and build organizations where people and performance thrive.

title: The Headliner Podcast: Discovery and Marketing
author: Headliner
description:
Want to grow your podcast or YouTube channel?
Meet your new, go-to resource for audience growth, marketing strategies, and content creation tips tailored for podcasters and creators. Every other week, we break down what's working (and what's not) when it comes to growing your show, share actionable insights from industry experts, and explore the latest tools to help you promote smarter—not harder. 
Whether you're just starting out or ready to take your audience to the next level, we'll help you cut through the noise and grow with confidence with Headliner.

title: Octus Radio
author: Octus Podcast Network
description:
The Reorg Podcast Network is evolving into something new. This feed will no longer be updated as we transition to the Octus Podcast Network. Our new platform offers exclusive interviews, fresh insights, and deeper analysis on the latest trends in finance.
Follow us on the Octus Podcast Network for a richer experience, and stay tuned as we continue to grow and deliver content that keeps you informed and ahead of the curve. Subscribe to our new feed to continue your journey with us!

title: THE ANGRY OLD MAN
author: JIMMY “ BOSS JONES “ THOMAS
description: This podcast is about me at the age of 43 give him my view on things as an angry old man

title: Dental Talks
author: Nabeel
description: Dental Talks is your trusted podcast for clear, practical, and expert-backed conversations about oral health, dental treatments, and the latest innovations in dentistry. Whether you're considering dental implants, exploring treatment options, or simply looking to improve your smile, we break down complex dental topics into easy-to-understand discussions.

title: Against The Grain
author: NewAge Poet
description: This podcast series is an extension of the music album, also titled Against The Grain— This is where the music meets real life. Each episode explores the themes, emotions, and stories behind the album through honest conversations with individuals whose lived experiences reflect what it truly means to go against the grain.

title: Continental Divide: A Guide to Colorado Divorce
author: continentaldivide
description: Continental Divide: A Guide to Colorado Divorce is a podcast dedicated to helping individuals navigate the complexities of family law in Colorado. Hosted by Sean O'Connor, the show features expert insights from leading attorneys like Kristi Anderson Wells, offering listeners practical advice on divorce, mediation, and collaborative law. With a focus on clarity and empathy, the series aims to empower listeners with the knowledge they need to make informed decisions during one of life's most challenging transitions.

title: Warrior Mom Life
author: Juliana Pauline
description: Welcome to Warrior Mom Life, where resilient mamas anchor deep, hold on to hope, and strengthen their families thru humor, faith and encouragement as we dive deep into raw behind-the-scenes talk of motherhood, perimenopause and military life. Honest, uplifting, and relatable, this podcast helps women feel empowered to thrive as they navigate holding down the fort without losing their mind, thru every season of life in the mama hood.

title: InResidency
author: The Bureau of Queer Art
description: InResidency by The Bureau of Queer Art is a media venture for Contemporary Queer & Allied Creatives to explore representation, identity, and themes of outsiderness in a culture of 'mall-ification'. “Queer' not as being about who you're having sex with (that can be a dimension of it); but 'queer' as being about the self that is at odds with everything around it and that has to invent and create and find a place to speak and to thrive and to live.” -Bell Hooks Apply to participate at BureauQueerArt.com

title: Broker Watch List
author: Bill Ivey
description: Learn about freight broker fraud, scams and schemes to keep money from carriers and drivers.  As the worlds #1 expert on freight broker scams, I have spoken with thousands and thousands of carriers that have been burned by brokerages and people acting like brokers, that planned on being fraudulent from the beginning.

title: Dynamic Transactions
author: Hogan Lovells Cadwalader
description:
Tune in to the Dynamic Transactions podcast series for unique insights into deals that don’t fit the M&A template. Hosted by partners Peter Watts and Caitlin Weeks, the series explores deals with a difference.

In each episode, Peter and Caitlin share a practical take on the business issues involved in navigating dynamic transactions.

title: What Happened to Anne Willgreen?
author: Eyeball Studio
description: Nicholas Fielding follows the disappearance of Anne Willgreen.

title: First Bricks
author: PJ Goupil
description: In this series, PJ sits down with seasoned property developers to talk about their very first property. It's a mix of funny stories, tough lessons, and the stuff no one tells you when you're starting out in real estate. The goal? Learn a ton, make great connections, and maybe even land some future business. It's real, it's casual and it's all about connecting across generations to see how the pros got their start.

title: Rob Seaman: Just Turn Up
author: Rob Seaman: Just Turn Up Podcast
description: After 30+ years in the global electronic music industry, I've seen what pressure, ambition, setbacks, and success really look like behind the scenes. As an Elite Performance Coach, I help professionals and entrepreneurs achieve lasting transformation. Just Turn Up is a podcast of honest conversations about careers, high performance, resilience, and the reality behind success. No hype or clickbait—just practical insights and real stories to help you gain clarity, grow, and perform at your best.

title: Beauty Sauce
author: 604 Podcast Network
description: A Podcast about everything beauty, Canadian and hockey. Created by touring comedian and Internet personality Rick Rowley.

title: The Mind Bending World of Rog Phillips, Vol 1: Explorations in Time and Reality
author: Rog Phillips
description:
Rog Phillips unveils a chilling dilemma in 'Mind-Bending World of Rog Phillips, Volume 1' as characters grapple with the very fabric of reality. When a time traveler discovers that his own past holds the key to an alternate universe, the stakes skyrocket. In this collection, Phillips explores the intersection of artificial intelligence and human emotion, challenging listeners to ponder the implications of machines that can mimic our deepest feelings. Each story immerses you in a maze of complex ideas and thrilling twists, inviting you to question what it means to be human in a world where anything is possible.

From a daring experiment gone wrong to a haunting encounter with an entity that defies explanation, these tales are rich with suspense and intricate character development. Phillips’ brisk prose keeps you on the edge of your seat, propelling you through mind-bending scenarios that will linger long after the last word.

Prepare for a journey that defies conventional storytelling and confronts the inexplicable. Whether you're a seasoned science fiction fan or new to the genre, this audiobook promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination. Don’t miss your chance to delve into the strange and inventive mind of Rog Phillips—where every twist opens a door to the unknown.

title: Chick Lit Book Club Podcast
author: Chick Lit Book Club Podcast
description:
Two friends discuss romance novels - the steamier the better. Many laughs and glasses of wine are had along the way. It's a little bit dirty, but definitely funny.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: MSPT Podcast Presented By PokerNews
author: Chad Holloway
description:
Established in August 2025, MSPT Podcast Presented By PokerNews is the go-to show for all the latest news, highlights, and winners from the Major Series of Poker: The Tour (MSPT).
Hosted by Chad Holloway and 2021 MSPT Player of the Year Kyna England, the show is available in both video on the PokerNews YouTube channel and audio on all major podcasting platforms, including Apple Podcasts, Spotify, and SoundCloud.

title: The Green Splotches: A Journey Through Science and Imagination
author: T. S. Stribling
description:
When scientist Dr. Elara Finch stumbles upon an extraordinary discovery, a series of bizarre, luminescent green splotches in the Amazon rainforest, her life takes an unexpected turn. These strange formations, pulsating with an unexplainable energy, hold secrets that could redefine humanity’s understanding of biology and the natural world. But as Elara delves deeper, she uncovers a dangerous conflict brewing between powerful corporations eager to exploit the findings and environmental activists determined to protect the rainforest's fragile ecosystem.

In "Green Splotches," T. S. Stribling crafts a gripping tale that intertwines scientific exploration with ethical dilemmas. Listeners will experience the thrill of discovery alongside Elara as she races against time to understand the implications of her findings while navigating threats from both sides. With each twist, the stakes grow higher, revealing not just the mysteries of nature but also the complexities of human ambition and greed.

This audiobook challenges listeners to think critically about the intersection of science and morality, asking poignant questions about our responsibility to the planet. Perfect for fans of action and adventure fiction, "Green Splotches" promises an engaging journey filled with suspense, intrigue, and a deep appreciation for the wonders of the world around us. Will Elara succeed in her quest for knowledge, or will the forces against her prevail? Tune in to find out!

title: Work Time Weekly
author: Rose Adam
description: A practical podcast exploring working hours, overtime, salary calculations, labor regulations, and workplace productivity. Perfect for students, employees, freelancers, HR professionals, and anyone looking to better understand the modern workplace.

title: Sniper Hog Lights Podcast
author: Jason Brooks
description: Sharing adventures in the outdoors.

title: Phoenix Phreedom
author: Kera M
description:
I didn't find healing. I had to burn down first.
Phoenix Phreedom is the podcast for people who've hit rock bottom, lost themselves, and are ready to rise anyway. Hosted by Kera Myles, Transformational Growth and Systems Strategist, this show brings raw truth, real psychology, and hard-won wisdom from someone who has lived it, not just studied it.
The "Ph" stands for the Phoenix, because this freedom only exists on the other side of the burn.
If you are done surviving and ready to become, welcome home.
www.phoenixphreedom.com

title: Hot Take Kid
author: Tyler and Dad
description:
The Hot Take Kid is an 11-year-old who knows ball and isn't afraid to say it.

Every other Friday, Tyler opens with the takes everyone else is too scared to make, breaks down the games and players that actually matter, and puts his predictions **on the record**. He backs every take with stats — scoring averages, shooting splits, playoff records — and he knows them cold. His dad just holds the mic, pushes back, and tries to stump him with the Stat Check (Tyler's batting .850 and won't let you forget it). Friends rotate in as guest commentators.

No teleprompter. No corporate takes. Just a kid who calls it and dares you to prove him wrong.

🔥 New episodes every other Friday. Subscribe and hold him to it.

title: Amazing Interviews
author: Renewal
description: Hosted by Mr. Josiah, Amazing Interviews is show where we have cool conversations to learn about the world around us, the people in it and most importantly the God who made it all.

title: Financial Wise Radio
author: Matt Copeland
description: Financial Wise Radio is an educational resource in retirement and financial planning. Hosted by Suzette Porter, owner of CapStar Financial, who has over 25+ years of estate planning experience and financial planning background. Each week on Financial Wise Radio, Suzette brings her experience to her listeners on topics of retirement planning, investment strategies, and wealth building.

title: What Fuels You?
author: Gina DeLucia
description:
Welcome to What Fuels You, a podcast about the things that fuel us in every season of life. From health and fitness to business, relationships, faith, and everything in between, we’re having honest conversations, sharing different perspectives, and figuring it out as we go.
Real life. Real conversations. And a little bit of everything.
So, what fuels you?

title: Satan's Garden: A Chilling Adventure into Occult Darkness
author: E. Hoffmann Price
description:
When the alluring beauty of two young women leads a group of friends deep into the shadows of Bayonne’s hidden underbelly, they quickly discover that not all adventures are innocent. In "Satan's Garden," E. Hoffmann Price delves into a world of occult practices and the dark allure of hasheesh. What begins as a thrilling escapade turns into a harrowing journey through the twisted corridors of temptation and terror.

As the friends explore the city’s secretive haunts, they unearth a sinister cult dedicated to the ancient and forbidden. The intoxicating effects of hasheesh cast a spell over the unsuspecting group, blurring the lines between reality and nightmare. With each passing moment, their desires lead them closer to a chilling confrontation with the supernatural forces at play. Will they escape the clutches of evil, or will their curiosity seal their fates?

"Satan's Garden" invites listeners into a captivating tale filled with suspense, moral quandaries, and the intoxicating pull of the unknown. As the plot thickens and danger lurks around every corner, prepare for an unforgettable experience that challenges the very nature of temptation and sacrifice. Dive into this thrilling audiobook and uncover the mysteries that lie within the shadows.

title: Deck Builders Pittsburgh
author: Tuff Deck Builders Pittsburgh
description: Tuff Deck Builders Pittsburgh delivers premium deck installation, deck replacement, patios, porches, floating decks, and wood decks throughout Pittsburgh, PA, including surrounding areas such as Penn Hills, Wilkins Township, Monroeville, Swissvale, Forest Hills, Edgewood, Shadyside, Squirrel Hill, and East Liberty. Our licensed and insured team builds durable outdoor living spaces using high-quality materials like composite, cedar, and pressure-treated lumber—engineered to handle Pittsburgh’s weather year-round.

title: Unutterable Horrors and Loathsome Entities
author: Frank Belknap Long
description:
When a mysterious artifact surfaces in a sleepy town, it unleashes a series of unexplainable horrors that challenge the very fabric of reality. In "Unutterable Horrors and Loathsome Entities: Early Frank Belknap Long," dive deep into the uncanny realms crafted by one of Weird Tales Magazine's most prolific contributors. Frank Belknap Long, a close friend of H.P. Lovecraft, draws listeners into a world where the ordinary collides with the grotesque, and sanity teeters on the brink.

This collection features Long's early tales that explore the dark corners of the human psyche, where dread and curiosity intertwine. Each story unveils a fresh nightmare, from spectral beings lurking in the shadows to incomprehensible forces that defy natural laws. As characters grapple with their fears, listeners will find themselves questioning what lies beyond the veil of reality.

Long's vivid prose and imaginative storytelling create a captivating auditory experience. Whether you’re a long-time horror aficionado or new to the genre, this audiobook invites you to confront your deepest fears while uncovering the profound themes of isolation, madness, and the unknown.

Join us on this chilling journey through Long's early works, where every tale is a portal into the unfathomable. Can you handle the truth that lurks in the darkness? Discover why these stories remain hauntingly relevant and continue to inspire fear in the hearts of listeners today.

title: Economía Hoy Podcast
author: Soy502
description:
Economía HOY Podcast es el espacio donde las decisiones económicas que mueven a Guatemala cobran voz.

En cada episodio entrevistaremos a empresarios, líderes sectoriales y expertos de alto perfil para analizar, con profundidad y sin rodeos, la realidad del país desde quienes la construyen. Contenido útil, conversaciones que importan.

title: Tyson Talks
author: Tyson Anderson
description:
What is “Tyson Talks” you may be wondering, well it is a show where I (Tyson) talk about interests and have a good time! 
This is the audio videos from my gaming channel, subscribe to TGamingLoft on YouTube to see gaming videos as well!
Star Wars & Film, Sports & my Faith in Jesus!
Hope you enjoy!

title: Wisdom for the Wilderness
author: Overland Church
description: Join the pastors of Overland Church in Fort Collins, Colorado, as they explore spiritual faithfulness amid life's challenges and suffering. Through discussions on theological questions and inspiring stories, Wisdom for the Wilderness offers guidance and hope for navigating the complexities of faith in a broken world.

title: The Driven Disciple
author: Isaiah Trapp
description: Join Isaiah Trapp each week as he and his guests discuss what it’s really like to run a business while pursuing God. Together, they explore the struggles, life's greatest lessons, mindset changes, and the challenges of building something meaningful without compromising your faith. Through listening to the show you’ll be encouraged to grow as both a leader and a disciple of Jesus Christ.

title: Inner Conversation
author: InnerConversation
description: Law of Assumption based manifesting, the inner conversation podcast provides guided inner conversations you can listen to and repeat until your circumstances change to your desired reality.

title: They Call Me The Seeker
author: Tommy
description:
They Call Me The Seeker  is a podcast hosted by Brian Conover and Tommy Simons—two thoughtful companions who invite you to sit down and wrestle with life’s biggest questions.

Brian and Tommy explore the profound mysteries that touch us all—faith and doubt, meaning and mortality, love and loss, the visible and the unseen— drawing on life experience, blending insight with humility and good humor.


New episodes drop regularly.

title: Unreasonable Expectations: A 4th Amendment Podcast
author: James O. Ruane
description: The Fourth Amendment is having the fight of its life, and every week Unreasonable Expectations breaks down the search and seizure decisions that landed while you were in court. Host Jay Ruane, criminal defense trial lawyer and founder of The Criminal Mastermind, surveys the newest rulings from courts across the country, calls out the wins you can put to work in a case that same day, and flags the losses that could reach your pending files and reshape your case theory. No ivory tower. Plain language, real doctrine, and takeaways you can carry straight into your next suppression hearing. Built for working criminal defense lawyers, and for anyone who cares about where the line between you and the government gets drawn. New episodes every Monday.

title: Your Honour, It’s a Blak Thing!
author: itsablakthing
description: Your Honour, it’s a Blak Thing! is a podcast by the Aboriginal Services Branch at Legal Aid NSW, created for legal practitioners, professionals and community workers across the NSW legal sector. The podcast centres Aboriginal voices, knowledges and lived experiences to deepen cultural understandings and support culturally safe legal practice.

title: The Retirement Game Plan
author: Greg Johnson | Vantagus Wealth
description:
Can I retire? And once I do, will I stay retired? Those are the questions that keep good savers up at night, and they're the questions The Retirement Game Plan answers. Hosted by Greg Johnson, President and Financial Advisor at Vantagus Wealth, this show is for pre-retirees and retirees who've worked hard, saved well, and still aren't sure they're doing the right things.

Greg doesn't lead with products or jargon. He leads with the questions you're already asking, then guides you through them one story at a time. Each episode tackles the real decisions of retirement: retirement readiness, the transition from working life to retirement, Social Security timing, pension elections, 401(k) rollovers, Medicare, tax-efficient withdrawals, Roth conversions, protecting against risk, and building income you can actually count on.

This isn't a show about chasing the highest return or beating the market. It's about clarity, simplicity, and confidence. It's about building a real plan so retirement isn't a guess. If you've ever wondered whether you're truly ready, you're not alone, and there's a path forward. Subscribe and let's figure it out together.

Go be great.

title: FOSTER'S YACHT SERVICES PODCAST
author: Yacht Kings TV
description:
A flawless vessel is the result of thousands of unseen decisions. While most observe the finished product, we understand the months of exact craftsmanship, engineering, and project management required to achieve it.


Hosted by Dennis Foster, CEO of Foster's Yacht Services, our podcast provides a direct look into the operational realities of the marine industry. Each episode brings together leading professionals to discuss complex refit management, technological advancements, evolving market dynamics, and more!


This series offers an unfiltered look at what it takes to maintain excellence on the water. Discover a higher standard of marine education. Stream the Foster's Yacht Services Podcast on your preferred platform.

title: The Time Mirror: Reflections Across Eras
author: Dwight V. Swain
description:
When Dr. Alan Brooks stumbles upon a peculiar mirror in a dusty antique shop, he unlocks a portal to the past—literally. This strange mirror doesn’t just reflect; it reveals glimpses of lives long gone, transporting him through time. As he peers deeper into its reflective surface, he discovers a web of historical events that challenge everything he knows about reality. But with every vision, a dark truth emerges: tampering with the past could have dire consequences for the present.

In "Time Mirror," Dwight V. Swain crafts a mind-bending journey filled with unexpected twists and ethical dilemmas. What would you do if you could witness pivotal moments in history? Would you intervene or simply observe? Dr. Brooks grapples with these questions as he encounters figures from ancient civilizations to pivotal wars, each interaction revealing more about the fragile nature of time itself.

Listeners will feel the tension build as Dr. Brooks races against time to understand the mirror’s true purpose while dealing with those who would exploit its power. With richly drawn characters and a gripping narrative, this audiobook invites you to explore themes of choice, consequence, and the relentless march of time. Uncover the secrets that lie within the mirror’s depths and discover how one man’s journey could reshape history itself. Will Dr. Brooks find a way to harness its power, or will he become another lost echo in time?

title: Beyond Winning
author: Causeartist
description: Beyond Winning is a podcast dedicated to the transformative power of sports and the people driving real impact. Presented by HypeRaise & 10-K, each episode celebrates the leaders, coaches, athletic directors, sports entrepreneurs, and nonprofit innovators who use sports as a vehicle for good.Together, we explore how sports build stronger communities, foster life-long leadership, and create lasting, positive impact.

title: It's Never About Money
author: Joe Stephan
description:
When it comes to success, there is a big difference between money and wealth. 

In It's Never About Money, host Joe Stephan interviews business owners who are pursuing deeper purpose and meaning in their life, rather than just chasing the dollar. Our guests put their values front-and-centre in business and are driven by making a positive impact in the world. Tune in to hear how their stories have unfolded and the key moments that got them there. 


Whether you are already pursuing meaning in your life or work, or wondering how the most successful are doing it, this podcast will encourage and inspire you to think differently, because It's Never About Money.
---
JOE STEPHAN is a Financial Planner with Stephan Independent Advisory, based in Melbourne, Australia: www.siadvisory.com.au 

IT'S NEVER ABOUT MONEY is powered by Stephan Independent Advisory: www.itsneveraboutmoney.com.au

title: Evolving on Purpose
author: Evolving Lives
description: Evolving on Purpose is a podcast for leaders and high performers who've achieved success — but feel stuck, because what got them here isn't getting them to the next level. Every episode brings you the real stories, inner work, and tools to work through whatever is holding you back from who you're meant to be. Because the impact the world needs starts with you evolving on purpose.

title: Who Turned The Lights On?
author: Shannon Eastman
description:
Formerly Trauma Informed Growth.  Life after Complex-PTSD, and just beyond those first stages of recovery, is a lot like having someone turn the lights on after years navigating in the dark. 
On this side of it, I reckon a lot more can be done to improve the sign posts that mark the way out. This podcast exists to discuss life in the dark, compare notes on mapping the way out, and explore what life is like with the lights on.  ​

title: Runways To freedom's Podcast
author: Runways To freedom
description:
In this episode, we have a feel into the inspiring work of Runways To Freedom, a nonprofit organization dedicated to transforming the lives of underprivileged talents within Africa's modeling and creative arts industries. We explore how the organization, founded by visionary Joan Okorodudu, provides opportunities for individuals from disadvantaged backgrounds—particularly those in refugee communities—to shine on the global stage.

We also discuss the pivotal role of ISIS Models, one of Africa's leading modeling agencies, in championing and developing the Runways to Freedom initiative. Together, these organizations are not only empowering young talents but also contributing to economic development in Kenya, aligning their work with key Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Join us as we uncover how Runways to Freedom and ISIS Models are working hand-in-hand to create a more inclusive and equitable fashion industry, providing a lifeline to those who need it most and showcasing Africa's immense creative potential to the world.

title: AI. Engineering Floor
author: Karel Smutný
description: Welcome to AI. ENGINEERING FLOOR, an expert-led video podcast hosted by Karel Smutný. How to turn AI hype into real results? We go beyond surface-level phrases and look at the moments when AI becomes a true part of everyday work – from writing user stories and prototyping to coding and code review. Expect honest practice without the polish, technical experts, and practical impact on development.

title: Lighthouse Seventh-day Adventist Church's Podcast
author: Lighthouse Seventh-day Adventist Church
description: test

title: West to East with Cooper Bell
author: West to East Provisions
description: The West to East Podcast is the voice of an outdoor brand built on something bigger than the outdoors. Through conversations about faith, hunting, fishing, sports, business, leadership, and everyday life, we challenge men to pursue Christ, build authentic community, and live with purpose.

title: In Progress with Tim Miller
author: Tim Miller
description:
Robotics and AI are reshaping our world. As the line between human and machine blurs, how do we stay connected?
In Progress explores the human side of this transformation. We sit down with the visionaries building the future and the everyday people living through it, from designers mastering AI to drivers navigating the robotic age. It is not just about the technology, it is about the stories, the ethics, and finding our place in what comes next.
This is a celebration of where we are heading, and of the progress built into who we are. Join Tim to find the human signal in the noise.

title: Club WDW
author: wdwadv
description: Join host Chad Smith as we talk all things Disney!

title: History Chats with Dr. S.
author: Dr. Riste Simnjanovski
description: Content for university level students seeking information about specific undergraduate and graduate level topics.

title: Sorry Just Looking
author: Sorry Just Looking
description:
We are opening the door into the mysterious world of Strippers. Step in and enjoy the tour!
Your hosts, Cinnamon and Clémence are international strippers who share their experiences in clubs around the world, which includes social discussion, excerpts from a double life, and juicy stories that you won't hear anywhere else.
Each episode will include a different theme such as potential double lives, relationship to alcohol, dating, relationships etc.
We will also have several guests to continue discussing various themes with us.

title: Always Growing with Kelsey Heenan
author: Kelsey Heenan
description: Always Growing with Kelsey Heenan goes behind the curtain with the trainers, comedians, athletes, doctors, and quiet experts you’d assume have arrived — to share the habits, the hurdles, and the never-before-told stories of what it actually took to get here. Each week, Kelsey sits down with someone she admires for a warm, unguarded conversation about the messy, ongoing work of growth — the part nobody puts on the highlight reel. Because growth has no finish line — and if we’re being honest, none of us ever fully arrives.

title: Summerville Church of Christ- Sermon podcast
author: Summerville Church of Christ
description: Podcast of sermons from the worship service of Summerville Church of Christ featuring Senior Minister Len Driskell and Associate Minister Don Alan Riggs.

title: Two Emotionally Aware Idiots
author: Taylor & Nicole
description: Just two idiots processing life out loud.

title: Hey Rabbi...
author: Rabbi Mayer Gurkov
description: Answering common and not so common questions about Jewish life, law, practice, customs, and history. Always based on the Torah, with authentic and foundation based answerers. No question is insignificant, and episodes are developed based on submissions by the listeners.

title: the Inner Practice, yoga for the mind
author: Catherine Haylock
description:
There's a calm that doesn't depend on anything going right. It's always there, just quieter than the thinking, and easy to lose under the noise of a busy mind.


This podcast is about finding your way back to it. We look at how the mind works and why it makes everything harder than it needs to be, how to work with our emotions instead of being run by them, and how to hear the intuition underneath it all again. 


Nothing to fix, nothing to become, just a clearer way of seeing what's already here.


I'm Catherine Haylock, and everything I share comes from my own experience, the difficult stretches and the quiet that came after.

title: Inside the Melon: The Watermelon Industry Podcast
author: National Watermelon Association
description: An original podcast series from the National Watermelon Association focused on the issues, innovations, and opportunities shaping the future of watermelon production and promotion.

title: This is Design School
author: Chad Hall
description:
A podcast for navigating the changing field of Design.

Follow the evolution of the design practice through the experiences of designers. Whether you’re an experienced designer trying to keep up or just starting out, learn from designers’ stories of how they’ve navigated the ever-changing field of design.

title: Beautiful Soul, Stop Hiding
author: Andrea Karlovich
description:
So many of us sensitive, empathic souls have spent our lives hiding—hiding our feelings, our needs, and even our true selves—just to feel safe in a world that hasn’t always met us with love and understanding. But deep down, our souls are calling us forward, urging us to step into the light and live authentically.

In Beautiful Soul, Stop Hiding, we’ll explore the fears, wounds, and patterns that have kept us small, and we’ll uncover how to heal, reconnect with our true selves, and take courageous steps toward the lives we’re meant to live.

title: JFK Files
author: Rob Walch
description:
On November 22nd 1963 JFK was assassinated. Two days later the alleged assassin Lee Harvey Oswald was gunned down while in Police custody by Night club owner Jack Ruby.  And for past 60 plus years - many have speculated the assassin did not work alone.  There were congressional hearings, FBI and CIA investigations and all of that lead to documents that were sometimes released after being heavily redacted or never released at all. Information kept from the American People - These are the JFK Files.

In President Trumps first term he said he would release all of the files - but then he changed course claiming QUOTE the potential harm to U.S. national security, law enforcement or foreign affairs is of such gravity that it outweighs the public interest in immediate disclosure. Unquote

At the beginning of President Trumps second term he signed an executive order to release all of the JFK Files.  

This podcast will go over what is in these soon to be released files.  Will these files just confirm the original story - a lone gunmen - or will it completely change the way we look at some 3 letter agencies, a past President, the Mob, a Foreign Government or some combination there of.  

How would releasing these files 5 years ago cause harm to US National security - but today it would not?

We will include your feedback and thoughts on what is found in these soon to be released files. 

I am rob from Podcast411 and I want you to send your feedback to podcast411@gmail.com - or give us a call 206-666-4357 - that is 206 MOM HELP

title: Heard!: Afros & Audio Interview Series with Talib Jasir
author: Vanguard Podcast Network
description:
"Heard!", hosted by Talib Jasir, visionary founder of Afros & Audio  is a key platform spotlighting the legacy and contributions of Black professionals in podcasting and audio. Join Talib as he engages with Black podcasters, audio creators, and industry experts, delivering essential insights and forward-thinking perspectives on the future of podcasting.
"Heard!" is where indie creativity meets industry expertise. Each episode offers actionable advice, explores emerging trends, and uncovers real opportunities for growth in the podcasting space. Whether it's mastering audio storytelling or leveraging the latest podcasting tech, you'll find practical takeaways to enhance your craft.
Subscribe to "Heard! Afros & Audio Interview Series with Talib Jasir" and be part of a movement dedicated to amplifying diverse voices and pushing podcasting forward.

title: This is Mental
author: Kayla Shea
description:
Welcome to This Is Mental, the podcast for high-functioning, glitter-loving chaos goblins chasing big dreams (and mental clarity) one bevvie at a time. I’m Kayla — pink-haired hockey mom, life athlete, student, designer, and future sports psychologist.
Expect solo rants, bite-sized psych insights, and unapologetic honesty about performing mentally and emotionally in this wild season of life.
✨ Come for the chaos. Stay for the sparkle. 
Your mind is a muscle — train it like one.

A wellbeing and lifestyle podcast hosted by Anneta Pinto-Young and Cherelle Wilson-Morrison, a dynamic duo of Certified Coaches, Experienced Trainers and Seasoned Speakers. description:
Welcome to the podcast where confidence is high, qualifications are low, and sports takes are delivered with the certainty of a Hall of Fame analyst.
We're just two average guys who love sports, watch way too many games, and somehow always think we know exactly what every coach, GM, referee, and player should have done. We aren't former pro-athletes, insiders, or experts—we're just fans with microphones and opinions. 
Each month we will give some popular and not so popular hot takes on the sports world and where our idiotic sports judgement stands on the matter.

Remote Key & Fob Programming

title: Creative Cravings
author: Lauren Feingold and Sari Feingold
description:
Oh, cravings... we all get them! 

That delicious burrata pasta dish you ate last year in Italy, the dessert Grandma could whip up without a written recipe, the fresh squeezed juice concoction you invented that tastes like paradise, the lobster roll from that food truck you saw a well-known chef devour on Insta Stories...

On this podcast, Chicago-based twin sisters, Lauren Feingold and Sari Feingold, encourage you to follow not only your food cravings, but also your craving to create. After all, you can't spell create without e.a.t! 

In our episodes, we bring you deep conversations with inspiring, food-loving, entrepreneurial guests who all share a craving to create across a variety of disciplines. Every Monday, we - and our guests - share our stories, insights, and lessons about what can happen when you do not ignore your cravings to create recipes, passion projects, businesses, or a lifestyle that aligns with who you are. Our guests also dish out their highest quality ingredients for living life to the fullest, so you can use 'em in your own life! 

If you are an ambitious, food-loving, creative soul seeking some direction on how to live a more fulfilling life, this is your show. While working hard is a big part of life, there is so much more that fills you up. That's why we make sure to ask our guests about ALL of their cravings, so you have recommendations to add to - and cross off of - your food, travel, and creativity bucket lists!

What are you waiting for? Let's dig in to the show. 

Visit creativecravingspodcast.com for more ways to connect with us and other listeners!

The personalised clothing industry continues to grow as businesses, organisations, schools, charities, and independent professionals increasingly invest in branded apparel to strengthen their identity and present a professional image. 
This review explores personalised prints limited within the wider custom clothing market, examining the products, services, and customisation options that have become essential for modern workwear and promotional apparel.

Motivational audio channel for those seeking inspiration, resilience, and confidence to achieve their goals. Here you will find messages about focus, discipline, self-confidence, success, personal growth, perseverance, and inner strength. Content designed to motivate your mind, strengthen your vision for the future, and transform dreams into achievements.

The Last 50 Feet where the physical world catches up to the hype.
We cover what actually happens when autonomous vehicles, robots, and AI-powered logistics hit the pavement — at grocery stores, retail properties, QSR drive-throughs, and the last hundred feet of every delivery. No lab demos. The infrastructure, the deals, the operators making it real.
Brought to you by Autolane — the platform coordinating autonomous vehicles and robotics on private property, one zone at a time.

author: Miguel Palet
description:
O “Pêlo Sim Pêlo Não” é um videocast dedicado ao universo animal, com foco em entrevistas e testemunhos reais, desde tutores e cuidadores até veterinários, terapeutas e figuras públicas ligadas ao bem-estar animal.

O conteúdo será gravado num estúdio móvel totalmente equipado, permitindo deslocações e gravações em diferentes locais do país, podendo por isso captar imagens dos locais onde a história se faz.

Entre os testemunhos recolhidos, destacam-se histórias com cariz emocional e pedagógico, onde animais desempenham um papel ativo no apoio à saúde emocional, mental e física dos seus tutores, incluindo casos de pessoas que encontraram nos animais um apoio determinante na sua recuperação e equilíbrio para o seu dia a dia.

Acompanha o Pêlo Sim Pêlo Não nas redes sociais: https://www.instagram.com/pelo.sim.pelo.nao/ e https://www.tiktok.com/@pelosimpelonao

description:
Join former police officer turned award-winning comedian Alfie Moore as he speaks to special guests about the neighbourhoods where they grew up, followed by their experiences as victims of crime, or the experiences of close friends or relatives.


Alfie and his guest are joined by an expert who’ll provide advice and information about what you should do if you find yourself impacted by crime, and how to prevent it.


Neighbourhood Watch is the largest volunteer-led crime prevention charity in England and Wales. Our members support communities to build safer, more neighbourly, places to live.


Find out more and join up for free today at www.ourwatch.org.uk


The Neighbourhood Watch Podcast is an Adore Audio production.

description: After years of growing up in the music and entertainment industry, artist Gavin Magnus and his tight group of friends are ready for story times you won't believe are actually true! title: The Mayhem Vibez Podcast
author: MayhemVibez
description:
Welcome to The Mayhem Vibez Podcast—where real stories spark healing, purpose, and transformation.
Hosted by Mayhem Vibez, this podcast is a safe space for honest conversations about faith, love, identity, relationships, heartbreak, healing, mental wellness, personal growth, and the courage to live authentically.

Drawing from the powerful journey behind the Pure Bliss book series, each episode explores life’s highs and lows with transparency, compassion, and hope. Whether you’re rebuilding after heartbreak, searching for purpose, navigating your identity, or simply looking for encouragement, you’ll find meaningful conversations that remind you you’re not alone.
Expect inspiring guests, unfiltered discussions, practical life lessons, and heartfelt stories that challenge, uplift, and empower.
Your story isn’t over. Your truth has power. Your healing starts here.
New episodes coming soon.
Real Stories. Real Healing. Real Conversations.

description:
Nobody talks about the loneliness of ambition.

You think differently, you lead differently, and most people around you don't quite get it. 

The conversations you can't have at the dinner table. The drive that lives inside you that few people understand.

If that's what you've been feeling, this podcast is for you.

Man Mission Money is for coaches, consultants and business owners who've already proven they can build a successful business and now want to design a business that gives them more life as it grows, not less.

Man sets the standard.
Mission sets the direction.
Money gives you the freedom.

description: Welcome to the Restaurant Leadership Podcast...the show for independent restaurant owners who are done surviving and ready to scale.Your host, Christin Marvin, founder of Columbine Hospitality and creator of the Independent Restaurant Framework (IRF), has spent over two decades in the industry...from line cook at 15 to managing partner by 30. She knows what it takes to build a restaurant group that runs without you in it.Each week, Christin brings you real conversations and straight talk on the three things that actually move the needle in a multi-unit restaurant group: People, Process, and Profit.This podcast is for you if you're ready to stop putting out fires and start building a business that scales with intention.This podcast will help you answer:How do I build a leadership team I can actually trust?How do I create systems that run without me?How do I scale to multiple locations without burning out?How do I increase profitability as I grow?How do I go from operator to CEO?Grab your copy of Multi-Unit Mastery at irfbook.com and follow Columbine Hospitality on LinkedIn.Voice Over, Mixing and Mastering Credits:L. title: High Freedom with Aiyahla

Welcome to High Freedom with Aiyahla, the podcast for visionary women, spiritual leaders, artists, impact makers, and movement-builders who are ready to free themselves, embody their truth, and create missions that change the world.


Hosted by Aiyahla, founder of Free Free, this podcast is a portal into high freedom consciousness, where spirituality, leadership, feminine power, healing, creativity, art and impact meet.


This is not just a podcast about growth. It is a remembrance. Freedom consciousness activation.


Each episode invites you to rise beyond the golden cage, awaken your wildflower within, and lead from the place where your soul, your voice, your mission, and your abundance become one.


Each episode blends:

• Spiritual awakening + soul remembrance

• High freedom consciousness

• Feminine leadership + embodied power

• Healing generational trauma

• Conscious wealth, service, and impact

• Building missions, movements, and new paradigm solutions

• The courage to be seen, heard, and fully expressed 


Whether you are here to awaken your gifts, expand your mission, free your voice, build a movement, or remember who you truly are, this podcast is for you.


High Freedom with Aiyahla is for the woman who knows she came here for more.

More truth.

More love.

More beauty.

More service.

More freedom.


🔗 Connect & Join the Movement:

→ Explore Paradigm - https://www.freefreeworld.com/the-paradigm


Keywords: Aiyahla, High Freedom, Free Free, spiritual leadership, feminine leadership, high freedom consciousness, spiritual awakening, conscious women, soul mission, new paradigm leadership, healing generational trauma, wildflower women, freedom consciousness, conscious wealth, purpose, movement building, women changing the world.

Since 1984, the Atlanta Radio Theatre Company has been performing, recording, and broadcasting dramatic audio -- fully dramatized, fully sound-scaped audio drama. From our archives, we proudly present the recordings of our live performances.

description: All Around Sports Host will explore all areas of the wide world of sports as it continues to grow and evolve. John's guests are today's leading sports newsmakers. John has attended everything from Super Bowls and Rose Bowls to the Stanley Cup and Ryder Cup, as well as the NBA Finals, World Series, and March Madness.

title: WV on the DOT
author: WV on the DOT
description: Transparency with and accountability to the public are vital to the West Virginia Department of Transportation as we continue to make fundamental changes to the way we work so that our whole system is more efficient, tax dollars are stretched further, and our infrastructure continues to get better (not worse) over time.  Our dedication to transparency is apparent in our interactive roadwork map, our use of social media, press events, and other means of reaching out to let people know not only what we do, but how we do it.  WV on the DOT podcast will provide a direct link where our leadership team and others within the WVDOT can share information in the simplest fashion; by having a conversation.  This will allow complex topics to be shared and understood like never before.

Listen to world renowned, Evidential Psychic Medium, Jamie Clark - your Host of Psychic Evolution - and Maggie Clark - your Co-Host, a prolific Spiritual Coach and accomplished Healer, as they team up to share their insights and perspectives for one of the most life changing and mind blowing podcasts!!!! Your Psychic senses are so natural they are super-natural!!!

 Join the Evolution and find your inner beauty to heal and your inner light to shine!

title: L.i.f.e
author: Kyah
description:
The Life Podcast is about the inconveniences in life that seem to find all of us — the ones that aren't always small or funny in the moment. The unexpected setbacks, the awkward situations, the emotional curveballs, and the everyday struggles that show up whether we're ready for them or not.
This podcast is a space to talk honestly about those moments - the frustrating, uncomfortable, confusing, and sometimes even painful parts of being human. Through real conversations and reflections, The Life Podcast explores how these experiences shape us, challenge us, and often connect us.

title: Boiled Milk - A Horny / Horror Podcast
author: Christian Estabrook and Elle Willers
description: Have you ever yearned for movie reviews of random but oddly specific films? Looking for someone to watch every installment of a direct-to-dvd franchise so you don't have to? Look no further, Chrissy & DB take you on a whimsical cinematic journey. Each episode promises to be kinky, freaky, and unhinged.

title: CarePoints
author: Kenny Schiff
description:
Navigating the complex landscape of healthcare technology can feel like playing a game of Double Jeopardy.
CarePoints, a new podcast series hosted by Kenny Schiff, will equip clinical directors, hospital administrators, and other stakeholders with insights to explore and actualize technology-driven solutions for improved outcomes.
What he does: A healthcare industry veteran, Kenny is the Founder of CareSight, a cloud-based patient care analytics company. In October 2022, CareSight was acquired by Lone Star Communications. Though healthcare colleagues often mistake him for an engineer, Kenny instead describes himself as an explainer teacher, translator, and problem solver. His interest in technology started early on and he has leveraged it as a way to support his musical pursuits.
Organization: Lone Star Communications, Inc.
Words of wisdom: "For me, the value of technology is not the 'cool factor,' not the bits and bytes. It's about what it can do for humanity and healthcare. It's about making patients safe and satisfied, helping to avoid adverse events, and improving the work life of staff."

title: My Life's Journey with God
author: MJ
description:
“My Life’s Journey With God” is a raw and honest faith podcast about walking through life’s hardest moments with God beside you. Through real stories of struggle, healing, and hope, this show reminds you that even in the valleys, God is working. If you’ve ever felt broken, overwhelmed, or searching for strength, this space is for you. Your journey isn’t over
— God is still writing your story.

title: The Kiawah Queens
author: Nina Foxx
description:
Four women. One island. A secret that won't stay buried.
Queens of Kiawah is a serialized fiction podcast set in the same Lowcountry world as my novels Island Secrets and the upcoming Low Country Lies. When patriarch Reginald Beaumont dies at his own Harvest Gala, four lifelong friends, a judge, a hotelier, a physician, and a journalist, uncover a will, a family, and a fortune he never told them about.
If you loved Island Secrets, welcome back to Kiawah. New voices. Same secrets, new lies.

title: SART Fertility Experts
author: Society for Assisted Reproductive Technology
description: An educational project of the Society for Assisted Reproductive Technology, this series is designed to provide up to date information about a variety of topics related to fertility testing and treatment such as IVF. The "Experts" include accomplished professionals:  reproductive endocrinologists, reproductive urologists, genetic counselors and mental health professionals who share their knowledge and advice in an informal interview.  Are you ready to take the next step towards building your family?  Start With SART!

description: Where faith grows, joy follows. My hope is that each episode leaves you feeling lighter, inspired, and reminded that joy is always within reach.

description: The Corner Blitz has our corner of Southwest Mississippi covered when it comes to sports. Hosted by Adam Northam, who is joined by Benji Embry, Brad Woods and Bradley Creel, each week you can hear the guys interview local coaches, players, and offer their take on anything in the sporting world.

title: Swedish History Through Punk
author: Anders Bjarby
description:
Two foul-mouthed British punks have broken into a cabin outside Kiruna, wired into a stolen radio mast, and started broadcasting. Between blasts of raucous punk, Gaz and Degsy stagger through real Swedish history — the Stockholm Bloodbath, Nils Dacke's uprising, the warship that sank in a puddle — getting the drinking and the details gloriously out of hand, yet somehow keeping the facts straight. Pirate Radio Kiruna: history lessons you didn't ask for, at a volume you can't ignore.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

description: Manufacturing Matters is a podcast from NEPIRC that explores the people, companies and innovations driving manufacturing across Northeastern Pennsylvania. description:

New episodes every week.

description:
The JourneyWoman Ageless Adventuress Travel Podcast is for women 50+ who see travel not as a luxury, but as a way of life. Whether you're planning your next big solo adventure, searching for meaningful connections, or simply ready to embrace the world on your own terms, this is your community.
Each month, award-winning writer, broadcaster and media personality Kathy Buckworth brings her warmth, wit and decades of storytelling experience to conversations that inspire, inform and ignite your next journey. With hundreds of interviews under her belt and a passion for authentic travel, Kathy sits down with fellow adventuresses, travel experts and trailblazing women to explore what it truly means to travel boldly, and age even more boldly.
Because the Ageless Adventuress isn't slowing down. She's just getting started.

title: Therapeutic Astrology Podcast
author: Mannah Guldager
description:
Therapeutic Astrology Podcast by Mannah (TAP) is place to learn og and feel into healing methods, psychological insights and the mystery pointed to by forgotten languages of the soul. My name is Mannah, and I aim to inspire you to a rich life on all levels of experience. As you listen, let the existential questions breathe into your inner realms where Wholeness is always present. Tap in with us for psychological insights, existential exploration, astrology, spiritual healing and living with purpose!
We are in good company with thought leaders, authors, and healers of our time - or sometimes of past times as I may read the authors alive in solo episodes. In common my variety of guests have a wish to stop fragmentation and care for a greater view of this embodied spiritual life. My own primary path is through Evolutionary Astrology, and in each episode I spend a few moments to tap into my guests birth chart.
Let's TAP in together - no matter where you are, you have a place to call Whole.
My website: https://www.therapeuticastrologer.com
Mannah, Trauma Therapist & Astrologer
Copenhagen, May of 2023

The Mapuana Reed Show is all about real talk and inspiring stories for women who are ready for more in life. We're talking about the highs, the lows, and everything in between—because growth isn't always pretty, but it's worth it.
If you're looking for a space to find connection, purpose, and a little courage to take that next step, you're in the right place. Grab your favorite drink, tune in, and join Mapuana and her guests as they share the wisdom, struggles, and triumphs that come with creating a life you love.

description: Late Night Thoughts isn't just a series—it's where honest conversations become honest music. This channel documents the journey of **Young JJ**, an independent artist turning late-night thoughts into records that tell the truth. Every song, every session, and every project captures the moments most people keep to themselves. This is for the people who feel overlooked, misunderstood, or still chasing something bigger when nobody else believes it's possible. If you've ever stayed up questioning your next move, fought battles in silence, or found comfort in music that understands you, you're in the right place. 🎙️ Late Night Thoughts Podcast 🎬 Album documentaries & behind the scenes 🎵 Music in progress 📖 The story before the success This isn't a highlight reel. It's the process. Welcome to the journey. Welcome to **Late Night Thoughts**.

title: Stories of the Relentless:  A Binge Worthy Series by the American Heart Association
author: American Heart Association
description: Bringing bold ideas to life, Stories of the Relentless is a video podcast that explores the untold journeys behind innovations in health care, where progress is shaped through risk, setbacks and persistence. Hosted by the American Heart Association's Lee Shapiro and Lisa Suennen, this season highlights entrepreneurs who turned straw into gold in a world full of "no," defying the odds, persevering through failure and making their vision matter.

title: The Movie Podium
author: Eric Merrow, Matt Scott
description: The Movie Podium is a weekly podcast where the hosts collectively watch a movie and discuss the movie - kinda like a book club... but for movies!

title: The Unapologetically Rich Show with Shamina Taylor
author: Shamina Taylor
description:
Welcome to The Unapologetically Rich Show with Shamina Taylor—former attorney turned Wealth Consciousness Mentor, bestselling author, mother of two, and host of this top-rated podcast dedicated to normalizing big money for women.
Shamina is a renowned wealth expert on a mission to lift income ceilings, break financial barriers, and make being wealthy the new standard for women everywhere. With a proven track record of helping over 51 women become millionaires and multimillionaires, and thousands more reach their highest cash months, she's passionate about showing what's possible when women unapologetically claim their power and wealth.
This podcast is designed for high-achieving women ready to ditch the hustle and unlock next-level wealth, freedom, and ease. Through her signature method—blending money energetics, subconscious reprogramming, and aligned business strategy—Shamina shares the exact mindset shifts and practical tools needed to attract premium clients, elevate your income, and thrive in full alignment without burnout.
It's your time to rise. If she can do it, so can you.

title: The Golden Hour
author: Jarve The Healer
description:
The Golden Hour ATL is a conversation space built for growth, reflection, and creative confidence. Each episode explores a wide range of topics—from personal self-growth and navigating the creative industry to the cultural currents shaping music, art, and pop culture.
Whether you’re an artist, creator, or simply someone paying attention to the world around you, this is a place to reflect, connect, and grow while staying grounded in your craft and your values.

title: Plot Twists & Hat Tricks
author: Plot Twists & Hat Tricks
description:
Plot Twists & Hat Tricks is a weekly podcast for hockey fans with a reading problem, readers with a hockey obsession, and everyone in between.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take. You also miss 100% of the pages you don't read.
First period: Hockey analysis, not a recap but a breakdown and explanation.
Second period: Book recommendation, no spoilers for the book being covered -- EVER, just why you should pick it up.
Third period: Wildcard. Could be hockey players put in a fantasy world, could be connecting our favorite stories to our favorite game. Tune in to find out.

title: Mildly Concerned, Deeply Invested
author: Chappy & Lo
description: Mildly Concerned, Deeply Invested is the podcast for anyone who has strong opinions about things that don't actually affect their life. Hosted by besties Chappy and Lo, this bi-weekly podcast covers everything everyone's talking about (whether they should be or not). Chappy and Lo bring the humor, the hot takes, and the "wait, did you see this" energy to pop culture news, reality TV recaps, entertainment industry gossip, and the occasional deep dive into whatever chaos the internet served up that week. Mildly concerned about everything. Deeply invested in all of it.

title: Debriefing and Cocktails: A James Bond Podcast
author: Reid Walker & Sergio Lugo II
description: Debriefing and Cocktails is a deepdive into the James Bond film franchise. From Dr. No to Spectre and beyond, Reid and Sergio of Reality Breached leave no drink unshaken.

title: Stone Cold Freaks
author: StoneColdFreaks
description: Hosted By Darrin Dortch and Dominique Lovings, Stone Cold Freaks dives headfirst into the messy, hilarious, and freaky sides of life. Expect candid conversations, jaw-dropping stories, and guests who are just as bold as the topics—because this is a judgment-free zone.

title: Industrial IoT Spotlight
author: Peter Rohde-Chen, Erik Walenza
description:
The Industrial IoT Spotlight Podcast shines a light on digital solutions that are impacting businesses today. Our mission is to feature the companies that are building the next generation of enterprise technologies, from architecture design to data management to business model innovation.
Our hosts, Peter Rohde-Chen and Erik Walenza, are friends and entrepreneurs based in Shanghai, China. The Industrial IoT Spotlight is produced by Asia Growth Partners, a group of technology experts and business leaders, who help technology companies and corporates navigate technology development, implementation, and adoption in Asia. 
Don't forget to follow us on LinkedIn @asia-growth-partners-agp or visit our website at https://asiagrowthpartners.com. You can contact Erik directly at erik.walenza@asiagrowthpartners.com

title: The Hours After Midnight: A Dark Thriller
author: Joseph Hayes
description:
When a heated argument with her boyfriend, Phil, pushes Julie into the arms of the menacing Nolan, she quickly realizes she’s stepped into a nightmare. Nolan isn’t just a greasy delinquent; he harbors dark ambitions that threaten everything Julie holds dear. As the clock ticks down, Julie battles against time and her own fears, desperately searching for a way to escape his sinister grip.

In "Hours After Midnight," Joseph Hayes masterfully weaves a gripping tale of suspense that explores the depths of desperation and the instinct to survive. Each moment brings new revelations as Julie navigates a treacherous landscape filled with deceit, betrayal, and moral ambiguity. Will she reclaim her freedom, or will Nolan's plans ensnare her forever?

Listeners will find themselves on the edge of their seats, captivated by the escalating tension and the unraveling mysteries of human nature. This audiobook is not just a story of survival; it’s a deep dive into the choices that lead us down dark paths. With its fast-paced narrative and complex characters, "Hours After Midnight" promises an exhilarating experience that will keep you guessing until the very end. Perfect for fans of crime and mystery fiction, this is one audiobook you won’t want to miss.

title: Uninvited
author: Irene and Jane
description:
The podcast that asks the "stupid" questions no one else bothers to ask.
I'm Irene. As a newcomer, I'm constantly confused by things everyone else seems to understand.
Why doesn't the US just take the Strait of Hormuz? Why the “ghost culture” is so popular in the western world?
In each episode, I bring these "stupid" questions to my AI co-host. We're not experts. We're just curious.
For anyone who has ever felt dumb for asking "why."

title: ’The Infertility Gal’ Podcast
author: danielleconrad19
description:
Hey Lovelies,

My name is Danni, and I just wanted to say welcome to ‘The Infertility Gal’ podcast, if you have landed up here reading this then I want to say thank you for being here. I am very grateful for your presence and excited for you to listen to this podcast which hopefully will be able to provide some useful information on infertility and in some sense I will be able to relate to you all, in whatever stage of the infertility process you are in. Hopefully we get an opportunity to interact together in the future, please reach out and introduce yourself and let me know about the infertility journey you are on, I am excited to meet you.

My Website: https://www.theinfertilitygal.co.uk 

My email contact details are: admin@theinfertilitygal.co.uk

My Instagram: @theinfertilitygal

My Youtube: @theinfertilitygal2025

My LinkedIn: Danielle Conrad, MPH

The reason why I started ‘The Infertility Gal’ is because I want to create a community of likeminded people who can share the latest information on all thing’s infertility related and provide advice on the latest innovations and what is currently available on the market. Please stay tuned in here on my podcast for more information and resources.

title: The Richest Man in Babylon: Financial Wisdom from Ancient Times
author: George Clason
description:
Meet Arkad, the richest man in Babylon, whose journey from a humble scribe to the wealthiest citizen unfolds through timeless parables. In a city thriving on trade and innovation, Arkad reveals the secrets of financial success that still resonate today. He shares practical wisdom on saving, investing, and the true meaning of wealth—lessons that will empower you to take control of your financial future.

As you listen, you’ll discover the fundamental principles of personal finance nestled in engaging stories that captivate the mind. Arkad's insights challenge you to rethink your spending habits and embrace the power of disciplined saving. What happens when he mentors others in Babylon, sharing his hard-earned lessons? The struggles of his friends and their transformations will inspire you to act on your own financial goals.

From understanding the value of paying yourself first to navigating the complexities of loans and obligations, this audiobook offers a treasure trove of knowledge that transcends time. Each chapter serves as a stepping stone on your own journey to financial independence, weaving together ancient wisdom with modern applicability. Are you ready to unlock the secrets of wealth that have stood the test of time? Dive into the world of Babylon and let Arkad guide you toward your richest life.

title: Ace Founder
author: 45Fusion
description:
Behind every breakout SaaS company is a founder who saw a broken, invisible problem and chose to bring a solution to life.
Ace Founder is where we tell those stories. No corporate talking points. No polished PR. Just the unvarnished reality of the journey—the near-misses that almost broke the company, the hard-won lessons, and the sheer grit required to scale.
Whether they are disrupting cybersecurity, launching service models, or scaling SaaS, we talk to the people building what didn't exist yesterday. 
Welcome to the reality behind the build.

Welcome to Chill Sports History, a show for calm, cozy, story-driven sports history.
We look back at championship journeys, heartbreaking near misses, long-awaited titles, and the players and teams at the centre of them. These videos are designed to be relaxed and easy to listen to, whether you’re watching closely, listening in the background, or winding down for the night.
If you enjoy timeless sports stories told in a warm, quiet way, you’re in the right place.

title: Pink Mondo Podcast
author: Petra Kereem
description: The Pink Mondo Podcast values real and thought-provoking conversations about life and the world we live in. We take lessons from personal stories, integrate facts from professionals into our day-day lives and inspire each other through connection. Sustainability is a core part of the initiative, which includes pillars such as social, economic, and environmental issues. These in turn cover a realm of ‘hot topics’ within themselves from human rights, mental health, ethics, and climate change. Putting all this together, the aim is to relook at how we interpret the term sustainability, helping listeners to create a genuinely sustainable life for themselves, while learning how to make the world a better place to live in.

title: Get Leaner & Live Longer
author: Nate Palmer
description:
IF you want to get leaner and live longer, check out: https://milliondollarbodylabs.com/
This show teaches YOU how to get lean by turning body fat into better focus so that you can live a long, healthy life. 
We all want a lean, muscular physique that performs as well as it looks, but we're BUSY. 
No one has time for marathon workouts and endless tracking of calories with kids, sports, work meetings, and all the building and creating we do in our own lives.
But what if it was easier than we thought?
What if we could get back into the best shape of our lives without spending every weekend meal prepping gross tilapia and broccoli.
That's the question that this podcast will answer. Albeit somewhat irreverently.
Jump in, and lets get lean together.
